title: Scalability
description: The system must be able to accommodate a large number of users and adapt to changing demands.

title: Accessibility
description: The system must be accessible to users with disabilities and provide equal opportunities for learning.

title: Usability
description: The system must be user-friendly and provide a seamless learning experience.

title: Security
description: The system must ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of user data.

title: Performance
description: The system must respond quickly and efficiently to user requests.

title: Reliability
description: The system must be able to recover from failures and provide a consistent learning experience.

title: Maintainability
description: The system must be easy to modify and update to meet changing requirements.

title: Standard Compliance
description: The system must comply with relevant standards and regulations.

title: Data Privacy Compliance
description: The system must ensure the confidentiality and security of user data.
